steps.title: Turn the function values into points
steps.content: $h(28)=15$ gives the point $(28,15)$, and $h(26)=22$ gives the point $(26,22)$.

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content:
$$h(x)=-\frac{7}{2}x+113$$
This equation uses the slope from the two given function values and the intercept found by substitution. It matches choice D.
